title: Tom’s Pride
description: Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.
scene: Across pages 13, 15, 16, 17, this part follows Franky, Tom, Spandam, Kokoro, Yokozuna. Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: Can I just call you frankly?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: What... is this dirty little room?

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: The perfect place to hide a blueprint.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The ware- House is a wreck,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But the world's best ship- builder...

summary: Tom takes responsibility for the attack and protects Iceburg and Franky, even as the World Government tightens its trap.
